name: calmcp
display_name: calmcp - SAP Cloud ALM MCP Server
description: Read-only MCP server for SAP Cloud ALM. Query tasks, defects, projects, features, documents, tests, analytics and more from your Cloud ALM tenant.
long_description: calmcp connects Claude to SAP Cloud ALM via its read APIs, exposed through four consolidated, intent-based tools: calm_list (query any collection), calm_get (fetch one entity), calm_analytics (sorted/aggregated queries) and calm_resources (discover resources, providers and recipes). Covers Tasks, Projects, Features, Documents, Process Hierarchy, Test Management, Analytics, BSM/Status Events, Landscape and Cross-Library objects. calmcp is strictly read-only: it never creates, updates or deletes Cloud ALM data.

tools.name: calm_list
tools.description: List or query any SAP Cloud ALM collection (tasks, defects, projects, features, documents, test cases, hierarchy nodes, cross-library/landscape objects, code lists).

tools.name: calm_get
tools.description: Fetch a single SAP Cloud ALM entity by id (a feature also by display id, e.g. 6-123).

tools.name: calm_analytics
tools.description: Query an analytics provider (Defects, Tasks, Tests, ...) with $filter/$orderby for sorted and aggregated questions.

tools.name: calm_resources
tools.description: Discovery: the catalog of resources/providers, the task type/status/priority code lists, and worked recipes.

calm_tenant.title: Cloud ALM Tenant
calm_tenant.description: Your Cloud ALM tenant subdomain, e.g. 'acme' for acme.eu10.alm.cloud.sap. From the OAuth2 service binding.

calm_region.title: Cloud ALM Region
calm_region.description: Tenant region: eu10, eu20, us10, ap10, jp10, eu10-004, ca10, eu11 or cn20.

calm_client_id.title: OAuth2 Client ID
calm_client_id.description: Client ID (clientid) from the Cloud ALM service key / binding.

calm_client_secret.title: OAuth2 Client Secret
calm_client_secret.description: Client secret (clientsecret) from the Cloud ALM service key. Stored securely in the OS keychain.

calm_sandbox.title: Use Sandbox (SAP Business Accelerator Hub)
calm_sandbox.description: Use the SAP Business Accelerator Hub sandbox with an API key instead of an OAuth2 tenant. When on, fill in the Sandbox API Key below; the OAuth2 fields are ignored.

calm_api_key.title: Sandbox API Key
calm_api_key.description: API key from sandbox.api.sap.com. Only used when 'Use Sandbox' is on. Stored securely in the OS keychain.

calm_debug.title: Debug Logging
calm_debug.description: Enable verbose request/response tracing (written to stderr).

calm_timeout_seconds.title: Request Timeout (seconds)
calm_timeout_seconds.description: HTTP request timeout for Cloud ALM calls.
